change.purpose: Independently audit retained Cloudflare deployment evidence after the deployment workflow completes by binding the downloaded artifact name and checked-out source to the exact workflow_run head SHA, then validating promotion consistency against exact proof bytes.

verification.method: isolated Node test using byte-identical workflow and contract-test source before commit
assertions: workflow_run is bound to the named deployment workflow
checkout and artifact selection use the exact completed run head SHA
audit permissions are read-only for actions and contents
audit contains no deployment command and retains only its bounded verdict

claim_state.observed: The primary deployment workflow retains proof, acceptance, and promotion-decision artifacts but does not currently execute validate-promotion-consistency.mjs before finalization.
claim_state.implemented: A separate workflow_run audit now checks retained evidence from the exact completed run and uploads a bounded consistency verdict.
not_claimed: promotion consistency proves scientific or medical truth
the audit blocks finalization inside the primary deployment workflow

privacy_boundary: No credentials, secret values, private chat, health records, personal identifiers, diagnosis, or treatment claims are stored.
rollback: Revert commit e067813d589a64b3e33ca3676f2c13e9870f2a7b; the additive test and evidence records may remain as history.
